_comment: Rename to .claude/settings.json. Hooks are deterministic guards — they run as shell commands and cannot be talked out of by the model. Customize per project.

PreToolUse._comment_1: GUARD: Block any agent except 'test' from editing files in __tests__/. Tests are immutable in DEV's role — fix code to match tests, never tests to match code.

hooks.command: FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); if echo "$FILE" | grep -q '__tests__\|\.test\.\|\.spec\.'; then if [ "$CLAUDE_AGENT_NAME" != "test" ]; then echo 'BLOCKED: Only the test agent may modify test files. Fix the source code to make tests pass, not the other way around.' >&2; exit 2; fi; fi; exit 0

PreToolUse._comment_2: GUARD: Prevent any agent from editing .env directly. New env vars go in .env.example with documentation; human updates actual .env.

hooks.command: FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '/\.env$|/\.env\.local$|/\.env\.production$'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Never edit .env directly. Add the new variable to .env.example with documentation, update CLAUDE.md, and let the human update their actual .env.' >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0

PreToolUse._comment_3: GUARD: Block dangerous bash commands. Hard-rm of common project files = stop and ask the human.

hooks.command: CMD=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.command // empty'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'rm -rf /|rm -rf ~|rm -rf \$HOME|git push --force|git reset --hard origin'; then echo 'BLOCKED: This command is destructive. If you intend it, ask the human to run it directly.' >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0

PostToolUse._comment_4: AUTO-FORMAT: After any file edit, run Prettier if configured. Customize for your formatter — biome, eslint --fix, ruff, gofmt, etc.

hooks.command: FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); if [ -f .prettierrc ] || [ -f .prettierrc.json ] || [ -f prettier.config.js ]; then if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|json|css|md)$'; then npx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true; fi; fi; exit 0

SessionStart._comment_5: MEM0 RECALL: If Mem0 MCP is configured, remind the agent to search for project context early in the session.

hooks.command: if [ -n "$MEM0_API_KEY" ]; then echo '[hint] Mem0 MCP available — agents should search Mem0 for project context as pre-flight'; fi; exit 0

SubagentStop._comment_6: LOG: Track subagent completions for visibility.

hooks.command: AGENT=$(echo "$CLAUDE_HOOK_INPUT" | jq -r '.subagent_name // "unknown"'); echo "[$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')] subagent $AGENT completed" >> .claude/subagent.log; exit 0

permissions._comment_permissions: Pre-approve safe commands so agents don't need to ask. Tighten or loosen based on what your agents actually need. The 'ask' list requires explicit human approval for destructive operations.
